name: rss-share-build
description: Compose RSS channel items and build feed.xml via rss_share.py

steps.text: Skill: rss-share. Script: python scripts/rss_share.py items.json -o workspace/feed.xml (or --demo).

steps.prompt: Using skill rss-share and knowledge/social/rss-share.md: (1) compose-items JSON for a channel from the user topic (or a short Fable demo channel if none) (2) build-feed command line (3) share-pack with HTML discover-link snippet (4) validate-feed checklist. Prefer summaries + links. No private tokens in feed URLs.

steps.note: Only runs if FABLE5_ALLOW_SHELL=1; otherwise user runs manually
